016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonCreator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
021
022import java.math.BigDecimal;
023
024/**
025 * POJO for `getinfo` RPC response.
026 */
027public class ServerInfo {
028    private final int version;
029    private final int protocolversion;
030    private final int walletversion;
031    private final Coin balance;
032    private final int blocks;
033    private final int timeoffset;
034    private final int connections;
035    private final String proxy;
036    private final BigDecimal difficulty;
037    private final Boolean testnet;
038    private final int keypoololdest;
039    private final int keypoolsize;
040    private final Coin paytxfee;
041    private final Coin relayfee;
042    private final String errors;
043
044    @JsonCreator
045    public ServerInfo(@JsonProperty("version")          int version,
046                      @JsonProperty("protocolversion")  int protocolversion,
047                      @JsonProperty("walletversion")    int walletversion,
048                      @JsonProperty("balance")          Coin balance,
049                      @JsonProperty("blocks")           int blocks,
050                      @JsonProperty("timeoffset")       int timeoffset,
051                      @JsonProperty("connections")      int connections,
052                      @JsonProperty("proxy")            String proxy,
053                      @JsonProperty("difficulty")       BigDecimal difficulty,
054                      @JsonProperty("testnet")          Boolean testnet,
055                      @JsonProperty("keypoololdest")    int keypoololdest,
056                      @JsonProperty("keypoolsize")      int keypoolsize,
057                      @JsonProperty("paytxfee")         Coin paytxfee,
058                      @JsonProperty("relayfee")         Coin relayfee,
059                      @JsonProperty("errors")           String errors) {
060        this.version = version;
061        this.protocolversion = protocolversion;
062        this.walletversion = walletversion;
063        this.balance = balance;
064        this.blocks = blocks;
065        this.timeoffset = timeoffset;
066        this.connections = connections;
067        this.proxy = proxy;
068        this.difficulty = difficulty;
069        this.testnet = testnet;
070        this.keypoololdest = keypoololdest;
071        this.keypoolsize = keypoolsize;
072        this.paytxfee = paytxfee;
073        this.relayfee = relayfee;
074        this.errors = errors;
075    }
076
077    public int getVersion() {
078        return version;
079    }
080
081    public int getProtocolversion() {
082        return protocolversion;
083    }
084
085    public int getWalletversion() {
086        return walletversion;
087    }
088
089    public Coin getBalance() {
090        return balance;
091    }
092
093    public int getBlocks() {
094        return blocks;
095    }
096
097    public int getTimeoffset() {
098        return timeoffset;
099    }
100
101    public int getConnections() {
102        return connections;
103    }
104
105    public String getProxy() {
106        return proxy;
107    }
108
109    public BigDecimal getDifficulty() {
110        return difficulty;
111    }
112
113    public Boolean getTestnet() {
114        return testnet;
115    }
116
117    public int getKeypoololdest() {
118        return keypoololdest;
119    }
120
121    public int getKeypoolsize() {
122        return keypoolsize;
123    }
124
125    public Coin getPaytxfee() {
126        return paytxfee;
127    }
128
129    public Coin getRelayfee() {
130        return relayfee;
131    }
132
133    public String getErrors() {
134        return errors;
135    }
136}
